title: ScoringLog
description: Per-run audit trail written by the Scoring Agent. Documents filter decisions, per-factor score rationale, tiebreakers, and edge case decisions — providing the reasoning behind scored_products.json that cannot be reconstructed after the fact.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the Scoring Agent began. e.g. '2026-03-18T18:45:00Z'

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when scoring_log.json was written. e.g. '2026-03-18T18:45:30Z'

candidates_received.description: Total candidates in candidate_pool.json passed to the Scoring Agent.

candidates_scored.description: Candidates that survived all filters and received a weighted score.

filters.description: Records which candidates were excluded at each filter step and why.

safety_excluded.description: Candidates excluded at Step 1 (safety override). These are never scored.

reason.description: What safety concern caused the exclusion. Include recall/regulatory source URL if available.

hard_filter_excluded.description: Candidates excluded at Step 2 (hard filters from requirements.json).

reason.description: Which hard filter the candidate failed and why (e.g. 'Does not meet hard filter: wireless — product is wired-only per spec_verification').

budget_excluded.description: Candidates excluded at Step 3 (more than 15% over budget and not qualified as stretch pick).

reason.description: e.g. 'Price $299.99 exceeds $150 budget by 99.9% — exceeds 15% stretch pick threshold'

scoring.description: Per-candidate scoring records for all candidates that were scored (including stretch picks). Excluded candidates are not listed here — they appear in filters.

final_score.description: Weighted sum of factor scores, rounded to one decimal.

factor_rationale.description: Per-factor score and one-sentence rationale. Omit a factor only if it was marked N/A.

score.description: 0–10, or null if N/A (e.g. all specs no_source)

rationale.description: Reference specific diverges/inconclusive specs by name.

na_factors.description: Factors marked N/A with reason. Weight redistributed proportionally.

penalties.description: Post-weighted penalties applied (confirmed community complaints, key spec divergence).

amount.description: Negative value subtracted from final_score, e.g. -0.3

stretch_pick.description: True if price exceeds budget by more than 15%.

tiebreakers_applied.description: Records any tiebreakers applied when two products scored identically.

winner.description: The product ranked higher after applying the tiebreaker.

edge_case_decisions.description: Records each edge case check from rules.md and whether it was triggered.

detail.description: What was triggered and what action was taken. Null if applied is false.
